name: RPG AI TEXT
description: AI-powered text-based RPG with interactive gameplay. Uses LLM for dynamic story generation.

name: LLM Battle
description: Competitive arena where language models play against each other. Elo rankings, supports local and cloud models.

name: Parley
description: Role-playing game focused on negotiation. Achieve objectives without violence in a fantasy world.

name: Text Adventure Template
description: AI-driven text adventure game template. Build interactive stories with LLM-powered narratives.

name: Battleship Demo
description: Classic Battleship game with AI opponent. Demonstrates LLM reasoning for game strategy.

name: LLM Game Master MCP
description: MCP server that uses LLM as a game master for tabletop-style adventures.

name: LMGame Arena Bench
description: Benchmark arena for evaluating LLMs in game-playing scenarios.

name: Gigax
description: Open source framework for LLM-powered NPCs. Fine-tuned Llama, Phi-3, Mistral for local inference.

name: LLM Colosseum
description: LLMs fight in Street Fighter III. Tests speed, strategy, adaptability. Mistral 7B, Llama variants.

name: Finite Craft
description: Infinite crafting game inspired by Infinite Craft. Combine elements to discover new ones.

name: DOOM Mistral AI
description: Mistral 7B plays classic DOOM. Demonstrates LLM decision-making in real-time gameplay.

name: MergeX
description: Open-world game with limitless NPC dialogue. Each character has unique biography and personality.

name: OpenRoleplay
description: Open source Character.ai alternative. Chat with AI characters, AGPL-3.0 licensed.

name: Make Debates Great Again
description: Mistral AI Game Jam entry. Play as TV debate presenter, strategically angle debates to win elections.

name: MarioGPT
description: Generate Mario-style levels from text prompts. Uses language models for procedural level design.

name: Text to Survive
description: LLM-based survival game. Make choices to survive in an AI-generated narrative.

name: AI Game Creator
description: Generate custom games with AI. Create playable games from natural language descriptions.

name: Nob Hill Noir
description: AI detective murder mystery game. Solve cases with AI-generated clues and dialogue.

name: Wordalle
description: Prompt guessing game. Use AI to match images to prompts in this interactive word game.

name: Doodle Dash
description: Neural network doodling prediction game. Draw and let AI guess what you're drawing.

name: SmartRobot
description: Robot command game. Use natural language to control a robot in a simulated environment.

name: AI NPC Dialogue
description: AI-powered NPC dialogue generator with filtering, sentiment analysis, and text-to-speech.

name: AI RPG
description: RPG project featuring AI NPCs. Open source role-playing with dynamic AI-driven characters.

name: Text Adventure (LLM Course)
description: Educational text adventure template from the LLM course. Learn to build AI-powered games.
